title: Drone strike hits Dubai airport, a major global hub, sparking huge fire
summary_full: Iranian drones have repeatedly hit Dubai International Airport, among the world’s busiest, since the U.S.-Israeli attack on Iran, but Monday’s strike was the largest.
summary_public: Iranian drones have repeatedly hit Dubai International Airport, among the world’s busiest, since the U.S.-Israeli attack on Iran, but Monday’s strike was the largest.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iranian drones have repeatedly hit Dubai International Airport
